## ERT1.2. En route capacity incentive scheme {#ert1.2.-en-route-capacity-incentive-scheme .Heading-2-ER}

The Spanish NSA reports a financial penalty of €7 785 082 for the ANSP because of the 2025 performance. The local incentive target for en route ATFM delays, due to CRSTMP causes only, was set at 0.2890 mins/flight.

The NSA reports an achieved performance of 0.71 mins/flight, including the post ops adjustments mentioned above.

\[NB The attribution of original delay causes on the ansperformance.eu dashboard is unverified\]
